evals.prompt: Use $prettify-pdf to redesign a government driving-test appointment PDF. The output should make the test date, time window, location, applicant, and application number obvious while preserving the original QR code and any official seal/logo.
evals.expected_output: A polished PDF plus a short verification note confirming exact preservation of date, time, application number, applicant name, location, QR code, and official visual assets.
assertions: The final PDF preserves the source application number, applicant name, date, time window, and location exactly.
The original QR code and official seal/logo remain visible and are not recreated or redrawn.
A rendered final-page image has no clipped or overlapping critical fields.

evals.prompt: Use $prettify-pdf to prettify an online license payment receipt PDF. Keep receipt number, application number, bank reference number, transaction ID, CPG transaction ID, amount breakdown, total amount, original barcode, and seal exactly intact.
evals.expected_output: A cleaner receipt PDF with priority summary cards for total amount, receipt number, and receipt date, with all listed identifiers and machine-readable assets preserved.
assertions: Receipt number, application number, bank reference number, transaction ID, CPG transaction ID, fee rows, total amount, and amount-in-words match the source exactly.
The original barcode and seal remain visible in the final render.
The final visual audit reports no clipped names, overwritten amounts, timestamp collisions, or unsafe relabeling.

evals.prompt: Use $prettify-pdf to QA a redesigned invoice against its original. Find any changed IDs, totals, dates, payment terms, missing logo, missing barcode, or unclear amount-due hierarchy before delivery.
evals.expected_output: A concise QA report listing preserved fields, any mismatches, visual/layout issues, and whether the redesigned PDF is safe to deliver.
assertions: The QA report explicitly compares invoice ID, dates, payment terms, line items, subtotal, tax, total, and amount due.
The QA report checks logo and barcode visibility.
The QA report gives a clear deliver/do-not-deliver decision based on data fidelity and rendered layout.
